data.body: COMPLETION EVIDENCE — change has LANDED on main. Gerrit change 950 received BOTH required votes (LLM-Review +1 by the rebar review bot AND Verified +1 by the rebar CI bot) and was submitted; it merged as commit ed8c747e8ea847abbc62ba640fbe7943a616e76e, now HEAD of origin/main (reachable from this worktree, carries trailer 'rebar-ticket: fd71-a0a0-d9b0-4769'). Local gates green: make lint, make typecheck pass; the full make test suite reported 7101 passed with a single unrelated flaky leak in tests/interfaces/facades/test_cli_argparse.py::test_sub_help_equals_help_sub (passes in isolation; my diff touches only voter.py/finalize.py/a new unit test and leaves the tree clean) — CI's Verified +1 confirms it did not recur. Deliverables: finalize._attach_code_review_metrics sums input/output/cache/total tokens across _usage-bearing steps into coverage.metrics; voter._publish_token_usage_metrics emits review_bot_llm_*_tokens to CloudWatch (best-effort) + an LLM_TOKEN_USAGE journald marker after a successful vote; 7 new offline tests. Follow-up 514d (milky-guidable-mandrill) filed + linked discovered_from for Pass-1 finder-usage capture (the documented coverage gap). The earlier plan-review is re-signed at the execution phase (verified_at_sha ed8c747e8).
